summary: Comprehensive testing of Kanban-Customer Status Synchronization feature. All 10 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified status dropdowns show exactly 6 fixed options: Beklemede, İletişimde, Teklif Verildi, Çalışılıyor, Kazanıldı, Kaybedildi. Kanban board displays all 6 columns with correct color coding.

issues: Minor console warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent' - accessibility improvement suggested (carried over from previous iteration)

passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/kanban/statuses - Returns exactly 6 fixed status options
✅ GET /api/kanban/statuses - Status colors match expected (amber, blue, purple, emerald, green, red)
✅ GET /api/kanban/columns?group_by=status - Returns all 6 status columns with correct colors
✅ GET /api/kanban/customers?group_by=status - Groups customers by valid statuses only
✅ PUT /api/customers/{id} - Normalizes old status values (takip ediliyor→İletişimde, olumsuz→Kaybedildi)
✅ POST /api/customers - New customer defaults to 'Beklemede' status
✅ Frontend: Customers page status filter dropdown shows 6 fixed options
✅ Frontend: Inline table status select shows 6 fixed options (50 data-testid elements verified)
✅ Frontend: Customer edit modal status dropdown shows 6 fixed options
✅ Frontend: Kanban board shows all 6 columns (Beklemede:351, İletişimde:513, Teklif Verildi:22, Çalışılıyor:98, Kazanıldı:1, Kaybedildi:15)
✅ Frontend: Kanban column colors match expected (amber, blue, purple, emerald, green, red)
critical_code_review_comments: Backend: KANBAN_STATUSES constant defines 6 fixed statuses with id, title, and color
Backend: normalize_status() function maps old values to valid Kanban statuses (takip ediliyor→İletişimde, olumsuz→Kaybedildi, etc.)
Backend: PATCH /api/kanban/customers/{id}/status validates against KANBAN_STATUSES titles
Backend: PUT /api/customers/{id} calls normalize_status() before saving
Frontend: Customers.jsx uses fixed STATUS_OPTIONS array (lines 235-242)
Frontend: CustomerEditModal.jsx uses fixed STATUS_OPTIONS array (line 34)
Frontend: CustomerDetailPage.jsx has statusColorMap matching Kanban colors (lines 640-648, 753-758)
Database: 3679 customer records with normalized status values

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All status dropdowns and Kanban columns verified)

seed_data_creation: Test customers created during pytest were cleaned up by test fixtures
context_for_next_testing_agent: Status synchronization between Kanban and Customers page is fully working. All 6 fixed statuses (Beklemede, İletişimde, Teklif Verildi, Çalışılıyor, Kazanıldı, Kaybedildi) are consistent across: 1) Backend KANBAN_STATUSES, 2) Frontend STATUS_OPTIONS in Customers.jsx, 3) Frontend STATUS_OPTIONS in CustomerEditModal.jsx, 4) Status badge colors in CustomerDetailPage.jsx. The normalize_status() function handles migration of old values to valid Kanban values.

features_tested.status_normalization: Old values (takip ediliyor, olumsuz, etc.) normalized to valid values
features_tested.status_validation: Invalid status rejected by PATCH endpoint
